data.name: 詛咒鎧甲2
data.detailed_description:
遊戲簡介

《詛咒鎧甲2》延續初代《詛咒鎧甲》的世界觀，講述主角莉莉娜在失去原有力量後，意外獲得帝國公主「索菲亞」的外貌與「靈魔女」之力，展開尋找聖物、解除詛咒鎧甲西西莉亞封印的危險旅程。

經典RPG冒險並結合變身系統，精彩細膩的世界觀、龐大豐富的主線支線劇情，

在這個世界，你將目睹莉莉娜如何跨越各種考驗，迎來結局！

劇情概述

莉莉娜在一次事件力量遭到封印，並意外的獲得了帝國公主-索菲亞的外貌與「靈魔女」之力。為了找到聖物，莉莉娜將以公主與靈魔女的雙重身分踏上危機四伏的旅程，不過…在這個瘋狂的世界，敗北的結果…可不僅僅是付出生命那麼簡單！成為魔女犬、用肉體供奉不死生物、與魔蟲交合產卵、把自己的魔力和腸道做為容器釀酒…一切都是為了解除詛咒鎧甲-西西莉亞的封印…..

遊戲特色

  • 正統續作，劇情延續
    延續《詛咒鎧甲》的世界觀與核心設定，劇情完整銜接，並附有劇情回顧，無痛入坑。

  • 像素風即時戰鬥系統
    操作主角於地圖上自由移動、閃避與施放技能，面對不同怪物展開即時戰鬥，並靈活切換變身型態克敵制勝。

  • 變身系統
    9種變身形態，變身不僅是戰術手段，也是一場命運的試煉。

  • 龐大文本與多重結局
    超過10萬字的劇情內容，錯綜複雜的角色關係與多條結局分歧！

  • 100+精緻CG，20+服裝造型
    豐富的H演出與劇情插畫，包含多段敗北事件與劇情插入差分，細膩還原每一次屈辱的瞬間。

人物介紹

人物介紹
data.short_description: 紳士向名作《詛咒鎧甲》的正統續作——經典RPG冒險結合變身系統，搭配大量H事件差分、蕩氣迴腸的主線劇情與豐富支線、高自由度玩法。延續初代劇情，莉莉娜意外獲得靈魔女之力，再次踏上冒險之旅。
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 10th gen or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce® GTX 960 4GB or above
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Windows Compatible Audio Device
  • 備註: dGPU recommended

data.name: Cursed Armor 2
data.detailed_description:
◆ Game Overview

After losing her original powers, the protagonist Lilina unexpectedly takes on the appearance of Imperial Princess Sofia—and inherits the mysterious powers of a Spirit Witch. Her quest to uncover ancient relics and break the seal on the cursed armor Cecelia begins.

With a refined RPG combat system, a deep transformation mechanic, and a sprawling main story with countless side quests, Lilina must overcome trials unlike any before... And you'll be there to witness it all!

◆ Story Summary

After a tragic incident, Lilina's powers are sealed—and she awakens to find herself transformed, now bearing the face of Princess Sofia and wielding the forbidden powers of a Spirit Witch. To retrieve the sacred relic and lift the curse on Cecelia, she must walk a perilous path, balancing the personas of both princess and witch. But in this chaotic world… defeat is far more harrowing than death itself.

Turned into a witch’s hound, offered up to the undead, impregnated by demonic parasites, used to brew liquor with her own magic and entrails… All of it in service of breaking the armor’s curse…

◆ Game Features

⚔️ A True Seamless Sequel

Builds directly on the world and lore of Cursed Armor, with optional story recaps to bring new players up to speed.

🎮 Pixel Art Real-Time Combat System

Roam freely, dodge enemies, and unleash skills in dynamic real-time battles. Adapt to every enemy by switching between unique transformation forms.

🔄 Transformation System

Transform into 9 different forms, each offering unique abilities and playstyles.

📚 A Massive Script & Multiple Endings

A richly layered story with high player freedom, branching side quests, and multiple possible endings!

🖼️ 100+ CGs & 20+ Outfit Variants

A wide range of adult scenes and high-quality CGs, with detailed variants and interactive elements.

◆ Characters

◆ Characters
data.short_description: Lilina returns in the official sequel to Cursed Armor: a dark fantasy RPG with transformations, steamy scene variations, and high-stakes choices. After gaining the power of the Spirit Witch, her cursed journey begins anew.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10+
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 10th gen or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce® GTX 960 4GB or above
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Windows Compatible Audio Device
  • Additional Notes: dGPU recommended
